title: V8 Engine
description: The V8 engine is a high-performance JavaScript engine developed by Google for Chrome and Node.js.

title: Hemi Engine
description: The Hemi engine is a series of internal combustion engines produced by Chrysler with a hemispherical combustion chamber.

title: Wankel Engine
description: The Wankel engine is a type of rotary engine that uses a triangular rotor to convert pressure into rotating motion.

title: Flat Engine
description: Flat engines, also known as boxer engines, have horizontally opposed cylinders and are known for their low center of gravity.

title: Turbocharged Engine
description: Turbocharged engines use a turbine-driven forced induction system to improve engine efficiency and power output.
